_readme: Transcribed by hand from fightcore.gg screenshots (Falco's move list), not
parsed from a DAT file the way fox_physics.json was. Treat every field here
as needing cross-validation against the actual PlFc.dat parse once that's
run, the way the synopsis doc describes for PlCo.dat. This file exists so
Phase 9/10 (Character framework / first fighter) has real numbers to build
hitbox/move structs against sooner, not as a replacement for the DAT parse.
UNITS: frame numbers are 1-indexed action frames (matches fightcore.gg's
display, e.g. Jab1 First Active = 2 means the hitbox turns on during the
2nd frame of the animation). 'x/y' style values in the source screenshots
(e.g. Damage '12/9%') mean 'hit 1 value / hit 2 value' for multi-hit moves
or 'clean / late' hitbox variants where the source didn't separately label
which is which -- see each move's _variants note.
Laser (Blaster) First/Last Active in the source screenshot is the
PROJECTILE's travel/lifetime window, NOT Falco's melee-hitbox active
frames -- same caveat the project synopsis already flagged. Do not treat
it as a normal move's active-frame window when wiring hit-detection.
Falco Phantasm (Side-B) here has clean numbers that differ from the
synopsis doc's earlier hand-written notes (Ground: 18-21/9%/65,
BKB74/KBG60; Air: 18-21/20%/270,BKB70/KBG70) -- the Air damage disagrees
(20% in the doc vs 7% in this screenshot capture). Screenshot value used
here since it's a direct capture rather than a remembered figure; flag
for re-verification against PlFc.dat when that's parsed.

attributesSummary._source: fightcore.gg character list page, NOT the DAT dump -- cross-reference only, same caveat as above

rapidJabs._note: Source table showed no frame-window data for the looping hits, only the per-hit damage/angle/KB.

downSmash._variants: damage 13% appears to be the front hit, 16% the back hit (angle pair 80/25 mirrors that)

forwardTilt._note: Identical numbers captured for the up-angled and down-angled variants (forwardTiltUp / forwardTiltDown below); source screenshot may not distinguish them, or Falco's tilt truly doesn't vary by angle -- verify against PlFc.dat.

upAir._variants: 3-way baseKnockback split doesn't cleanly pair with the 2-way damage/angle/effect split in the source table; transcribed as-is, needs the real PlFc.dat parse to disambiguate hit1/hit2/hit3

backAir._variants: damage pair is [clean, late]; note this is one of Falco's signature kill moves

forwardAir._variants: multi-hit (up to 5 hits) hitting-late damage decay: 9/8/7/5/3%

blasterGround._note: firstActive/lastActive is the LASER PROJECTILE's travel/lifetime window, not Falco's own melee-hitbox active frames -- see file-level _readme.

falcoPhantasmAir._note: damage disagrees with the earlier hand-noted 20% in the project synopsis doc -- see file-level _readme, re-verify against PlFc.dat
